title: Write to File
description: Create a new text file and save a string into it using file_put_contents().
problemStatement:
Save data! Use `file_put_contents()` to create a file named `log.txt` containing the text `"Session started"`.

**Requirement:** One line of code.
hints: This function is the easiest way to write a string to a file.
expectedOutput: File log.txt is created on the server
